title: Random Block Drops
description: Each block in the game drops a random item! The perfect challenge to try with friends or yourself.
body:
## Minecraft is boring? Here is a challenge!
In every new world, each block in the game drops a random item!
This means, a oak log could drop carrots, or grass could drop ender eyes! Some blocks don't even drop anything! You can use it on your server to play the challenge with your friends, and try to beat the ender dragon with it! Have fun!
